title: BigBasket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: BigBasket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Full Stack Developer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
